title: Looking for Hotel Manager at McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Looking for Hotel Manager at McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
